newsItem.headline: Leeds United push £43m record bid for Diomande; Sporting firm on €50m

newNews.reasoning: Jun 9 article is newer than Jun 10 Leeds news already listed. OneFootball source provides fresh details on Leeds' £43m push with confirmation of Sporting's €50m asking price and Chelsea/Arsenal interest.

newsItem.headline: Faye confirmed fit and available; returned to regular play at Lorient

newNews.reasoning: Research confirms Faye made PSG appearance (May 2) with recent 6.6 rating. Existing news already covers this date but verifies injury recovery is complete and he is now regular_starter, not injury status.

statusChanges.source: Recent appearance data (May 2026) confirms full recovery and continued playing time at Lorient; multiple May 2026 appearances documented
